## [00:00 - 02:52]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents in under two minutes. I come to you in a somber moment here at the Grant Rant because I got this report that fewer Americans are getting married. 51% of the people in America are getting married. That's a 5% drop, almost a 6% drop from last year, and a 22-point drop from the 1960s when I was born. So the marriage rate is going down among all age groups in the U.S., but most dramatically among young adults. What would cause that to happen? They don't have money? They don't want a partner? What would it be? Well, I'm going to tell you one thing that I think it is. Number one is the media is suggesting to America that marriage is terrible, that marriage is bad. On TV, what do you see? You hear about the failing marriages, you don't hear about the successful marriages. This is a problem for America, okay? Because this is the problem for this. This is teaching people to quit and to give up. When they made a commitment to stick with it, hang in there, make it happen, make it work. So I'm not suggesting to you some moral situation here. I'm just telling you this, okay? When I married my wife, I'm like, I'm in it to win it, dude. You can't get rid of me. There's nothing you can do, Elena. And I told her the other night, she says, oh, I would hate to want to get rid of you because, man, you'd make it hard. I said, no, I wouldn't make it hard. I'd make it impossible. There is nothing she can do that would convince me to leave her. I've slammed the door on that alternative. So if I slam the door on it, commit fully, I'm going to create on my relationship. One of the things, and one of the reasons I believe that people are bailing out of their marriages is because they saw the difficulties maybe their parents had. And that just goes to show you. I mean, the good news in that, it goes to show you that husbands and wives, fathers and mothers, you have a tremendous opportunity, a tremendous role in society to give the right picture to your children. So make your marriage successful. Make your marriage work. Commit to your marriage all the way. Create on your marriage the way you did when you were, you know, when you guys were the first two weeks, man. Everything was exciting. You couldn't sleep. You couldn't eat. You literally could go three days having sex 36 hours in a row. And the only thing you did was come up for a breath of air and more sex and more excitement. Oh my gosh, I got to hold your hand. I got to touch your hair. I got to smell you. You were in love, dude. Love is a decision. It's not some chemical reaction. It's a decision and it's a decision you have to make every day. So look, America, I know you want to be married, man. There's no reason you wouldn't want to be married. Okay. Why are relationship sites? The number one hit sites on the internet if people don't want to be together. Make your marriage work.
